name: Velvet Rows
overview: Curated Jellyfin home rails for language-aware discovery.
description: Velvet Rows adds curated homepage shelves for English, Malayalam, and Tamil movies plus metadata-aware Malayalam TV discovery inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog:
- Add metadata-aware Malayalam TV filtering for mixed TV libraries
- Add Tamil movie shelves and improved plugin settings UI
- Add plugin repository manifest, branding metadata, and release automation
